commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Heart struck him; viz., with remorse, as fearing he had done amiss. (Challoner)
A tender conscience is uneasy about things which are not sinful, while some stick at nothing. (Worthington)
The action of David seemed disrespectful. (Calmet)
"The subjects of kings adore the royal name as a divinity. "(Curtius vii.) Regium nomen.pro deo colunt.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Heart struck him: Viz., with remorse, as fearing he had done amiss.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
